verdict_summary: gamma_sse_v7 envelope reached gamma at /ai/v2/generation (status 200, mimeType text/event-stream, body contains '차단' warning), but gamma SPA did NOT render the warning text into the outline card; subsequent /ai/v2/render-generation request failed with HTTP/2 protocol error. RRN absent — but warning also absent from UI.

evidence.console_errors_excerpt: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request | POST https://ai.api.gamma.app/ai/v2/render-generation net::ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR | Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: Failed to fetch
evidence.outline_card_content: Card #1 rendered as empty pink-bordered outline item with no text — total cards: 1, character count: 0/50000

recommendation: Forged SSE on /ai/v2/generation is delivered but gamma SPA does NOT render arbitrary text into outline cards. gamma's outline pipeline appears to require: (a) a SECOND endpoint /ai/v2/render-generation to complete (which currently 502s with ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR — suggesting engine is dropping/breaking that request), and/or (b) the SSE 'data:' chunks to contain structured outline JSON with explicit card_title/card_content fields rather than narrative paragraph. Next direction: capture a clean baseline HAR of a normal gamma outline (no APF intercept) to confirm exact data: chunk schema (likely JSON like {"type":"card_title","value":"..."} or similar incremental outline tokens), then update gamma_sse_v7 to emit outline-shaped chunks. Also investigate why /ai/v2/render-generation is failing — engine may need to forward it transparently or also forge a parallel SSE response.
notes: Both the OUTLINE generation endpoint and a follow-up RENDER-GENERATION endpoint are needed for gamma. The HAR analysis #745 only covered ONE endpoint. /ai/v2/render-generation currently fails with HTTP/2 protocol error (visible in console + Network panel as red 'failed' entry). RRN decode is genuinely ABSENT (S2 not regressing) but warning text never makes it to the user-visible outline card — the SPA receives the SSE bytes (size 148B as expected) but rejects/ignores the unstructured plain text chunk. Test conducted at 2026-05-07 16:24-16:30 KST on test PC Windows 11 + Chrome with DevTools open. HAR saved local-only at files/748/gamma_pii_session.har (92.5 KB, gitignored).
